prompt: Change an internal instruction only after identifying its canonical owner, the user-visible effect, the verification that protects it, and a plain-language explanation of the result.
must: audit an internal rule change against its canonical owner and user effect
name verification proportionate to the changed behavior
explain the outcome in plain language
must_not: delete wording merely to reduce a footprint
describe internal maintenance as user value without evidence
evidence: Static rule-maintenance safeguard; it checks source-contract coverage rather than live behavior.
